summary: Comprehensive testing of Customer Authentication and Account features completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests for AccountPage, CartPage shipping form, and auto-fill functionality passed.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - creates customer with email, password, first_name, last_name - 200 OK
POST /api/auth/register - rejects duplicate email with 400
POST /api/auth/login - authenticates with email/password, returns JWT token - 200 OK
POST /api/auth/login - rejects wrong password with 401
POST /api/auth/login - rejects non-existent email with 401
GET /api/auth/me - returns customer profile when authenticated - 200 OK
GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 when not authenticated
GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 with invalid token
PUT /api/auth/profile - updates first_name, last_name, phone - verified persistence
PUT /api/auth/address - saves shipping address with all fields - verified persistence
GET /api/auth/orders - returns customer orders (list) when authenticated
GET /api/auth/orders - returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/checkout/session - rejects if no shipping_address provided (400)
POST /api/checkout/session - rejects if phone is missing (400)
POST /api/checkout/session - rejects if required shipping fields are missing (400)
POST /api/checkout/session - accepts complete shipping info and creates checkout session
Account page /account shows login form when not logged in
Registration form works - toggle to register mode shows first_name, last_name fields
Login form authenticates user and shows account dashboard
After login, account dashboard shows Profile, Shipping Address, Order History tabs
Profile section shows name, email, phone with Edit button
Shipping Address section shows saved address form
Order History section shows empty state or orders list
Sign Out button logs user out and shows auth forms again
Header shows user icon linking to /account
Cart page shows mandatory shipping form with fields: first_name, last_name, address_line1, city, state, zip_code, phone
Cart checkout validates shipping fields before proceeding - shows error if empty
Logged-in user's saved address auto-fills in cart shipping form
seed_data_creation: Created test customer accounts during testing with unique UUIDs - automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer authentication fully implemented and tested. Customer data stored in MongoDB 'customer_accounts' collection. JWT tokens stored in localStorage as 'pnice_customer_token'. Checkout endpoint requires shipping_address with mandatory fields: first_name, last_name, address_line1, city, state, zip_code, phone. Account page has tabs for Profile, Shipping Address, and Order History. All data-testid attributes present for test automation.

frontend_pages: AccountPage - auth forms, profile, address, orders sections
